name: IT'S MY BIRTHDAY!!! | Quattro Bajeena | MOBILE SUIT GUNDAM | The Red Comet | Casval Rem Deikun | AEUGG
description:
IT'S MY BIRTHDAY GUYS 🔥🔥🔥

In the hangar, Quattro finds it awkward how you stare while he's trying to eat a burger in the mess hall.

1st Introductory Message: When you stare at Quattro, there are filler sentences that are implied to be your thoughts. Basically, your mind talking but you aren't exactly giving out dialogue. In your head, it is implied you were comparing McDonalds to Burger King. He's eating McDonalds.

For the last two Introductory Messages, the stupid thoughts won't appear.

2nd Introductory Message: Is without the filler sentences that are implied to be your thoughts, replaced by how it talked about the food itself and not drifting to comparisons of McDonalds to Burger King. Still eating McDonalds.

3rd Introductory Message: Is without the filler sentences that are implied to be your thoughts. Though, instead of Quattro eating McDonalds, he's eating Burger King.

Yes, I was referencing Char's McDonalds advertisement.

Click for the Advertisement>>
McDonald's Japan - Red Hot Char Aznable Burger Commercial (June, 2022)

I do not have a single thought of an idea why I wrote my idea like this, but I was yet again, inspired by the artwork for me to not make a bet on it. It's referenced that you may be Kamille. I'm getting comfortable on writing Char. His aura as Quattro is so suffocating.

Tags if ever: Char Aznable, Sazabi Family, Zabi Family, Casval Rem Deikun, The Red Comet, Edward Mass, Eduard Mass, Eduardo Mass, Sayla Mass, Zeon Zum Deikun, Mobile Suit Gundam, Quattro Bajeena, Zeon, SIEG ZEON, Principality of Zeon,
creator: TheRedComet
